name: ExtensionEvidenceReport_Status
title: R5: draft | active | retired | unknown (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `EvidenceReport.status` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`EvidenceReport.status` 1..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `EvidenceReport.status` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `EvidenceReport.status` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `EvidenceReport` is not mapped.
Element `EvidenceReport.status` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `EvidenceReport.status` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `EvidenceReport` is not mapped.
Element `EvidenceReport.status` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
Allows filtering of summaries that are appropriate for use versus not.

See guidance around (not) making local changes to elements [here](https://hl7.org/fhir/canonicalreso.html#localization).
element.isModifierReason: This is labeled as "Is Modifier" because applications should not use a retired {{title}} without due consideration

element.definition: The status of this summary. Enables tracking the life-cycle of the content.
element.comment:
Allows filtering of summaries that are appropriate for use versus not.

See guidance around (not) making local changes to elements [here](https://hl7.org/fhir/canonicalreso.html#localization).

binding.description: The lifecycle status of an artifact.
